feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: Personal website of Jan Teusen (né Boelts). Senior AI Researcher at TransferLab, appliedAI Institute. Lead developer of the sbi Python package. I work on simulation-based inference and probabilistic machine learning, and I care about making advanced ML methods accessible through open-source tools and education.

entry.title: New site, new home for blog posts

link.title: New site, new home for blog posts

entry.content:
The site is now built with al-folio, Jekyll-based and hosted on GitHub Pages. The plan: turn this blog into a place to write longer-form notes on simulation-based inference, probabilistic ML, and the things I learn while working on the sbi package.

In the meantime, I cross-post or summarize most applied work on the TransferLab blog — including my ICLR 2024 blogpost on [topic]. An expanded follow-up to that piece is the first thing I plan to publish here.

More soon.
entry.summary: This site has moved to Jekyll + al-folio. Blog posts on simulation-based inference and probabilistic ML are coming.
